name: Dynamic Tags
description: Dynamically strips priority prefixes, formats multi-word tags, and customizes base tag styling. In v1.5.0 added new tags: #Pending, #In-progress, #Submitted, #In-review, #Success, #Failed, #Expired. In v1.5.5 added Nested Tags — e.g. #Success/To-Do renders as 'To Do' with circle icon and green background.
author: Waghmare
